name: French Chocolate Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir and scald the milk, sugar, and chocolate in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Pour part of these ingredients into the beaten egg yolks.
3. Return the remaining mixture to the pan with the rest of the milk. Stir constantly over low heat until thickened. Strain it. Cool by placing the pan in cold water.
4. In a separate bowl, whip the cream, vanilla, and brandy until stiff.
5. Gently fold the cooled custard into the whipped cream mixture until well blended. Fill custard cups with the pudding.
6. Chill thoroughly before serving.
